specializations: Bone marrow stem cell conditioned media
product_highlights: Bone marrow stem cell conditioned media — unique source
Rich in growth factors, cytokines, and signaling molecules
Clinically validated for skin regeneration and anti-aging
notes: US-based pioneer in stem cell-derived growth factor ingredients using bone marrow stem cell conditioned media — a unique and highly potent source of growth factors and cytokines. AnteAGE's ingredients are used in both professional medical aesthetics and consumer skincare. Strong clinical validation for skin regeneration, wound healing, and anti-aging applications. Premium positioning in the biotech beauty space.
